version_description: This version is adapted to standard tuning.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]  
Dear future husband[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Here's a few things you'll need to know if[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Ebm[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]
You want to be my one and only[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Db[/ch]
All my life[/tab]

Pa-a-a-a-a-a-u-u-u-u-u-u-s-s-s-e-e-e


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                
Take me on a date[/tab]
               
I deserve a break
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]
And don't forget the flowers[/tab]

Every anniversary
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
Cause if you treat me right[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
I'll be the perfect wife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Buy groceries[/tab]

Buy buy what you need
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
You got that 9 to 5[/tab]

But baby so do I
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]
So don't be thinking I'll be home and baking apple pies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
I never learned to cook[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
But I can write a hook[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Sing along with me[/tab]

Sing sing along with me

Hey


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                                     [ch]Bbm[/ch]  
You gotta know how to treat me like a lady[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Gb[/ch]
Even when I'm acting kinda crazy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Ab7[/ch]                       [ch]Db[/ch]
Tell me everything's alright[/tab]

Pa-a-a-a-a-a-u-u-u-u-u-u-s-s-s-e-e-e


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Dear future husband[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Here's a few things you need to know if[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gb[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]                   [ch]Db[/ch]
You wanna be my one and only all my life[/tab]


Dear future husband
[tab]                [ch]Bbm[/ch]
If you want to get that special lovin'[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gb[/ch]          [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
Tell me i'm beautiful each and every night[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
After every fight [/tab]

Just apologize
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]
And maybe then I'll let you try and rock my body right[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
Even if I was wrong[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab7[/ch]
(You know I'm never wrong)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Why disagree[/tab]

Why why disagree


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                                   [ch]Bbm[/ch]
You gotta know how to treat me like a lady[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Gb[/ch]
Even when I'm acting crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab7[/ch]                      [ch]Db[/ch]
Tell me everything's alright[/tab]



Pa-a-a-a-a-a-u-u-u-u-u-u-s-s-s-e-e-e


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Dear future husband[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Here's a few things you need to know if[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
You wanna be my one and only all my life[/tab]



Dear future husband
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Make time for me[/tab]

Don't leave me lonely
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
And we will never see your family more than mine[/tab]


[Verse 3]

(hand claps)

I'll be sleeping on the left side of the bed

Open doors for me and you might get some... kisses

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Don't have a dirty mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
Just be a classy guy[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Buy me a ring[/tab]

Buy buy me a ring


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
You gotta know how to treat me like a lady[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Even when I'm acting crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]

[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
If you wanna get that special loving[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Tell I'm beautiful each and every night[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Oh Future husband[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Better love me right[/tab]
